events.title: Collector Onboarding Office Hours
events.description: Monthly orientation for new collectors: channel etiquette, request paths, and support workflow. Topics include verifying your account, understanding moderation policies, and navigating the collector community.
events.summary: Monthly orientation for new collectors: channel etiquette, request paths, and support workflow.

events.title: Magazine Issue Preview
events.description: Preview call for upcoming collector magazine issue, featuring community submissions. Hear from editors about upcoming features, submit story ideas, and vote on cover design.
events.location: Virtual meetup (Zoom link sent to registered attendees)
events.summary: Preview call for upcoming collector magazine issue, featuring community submissions.

events.title: Safety + Verification AMA
events.description: Open Q&A focused on impersonation prevention, official handle verification, and moderation. Learn how to spot fake accounts, report suspicious activity, and access verified support channels.
events.summary: Open Q&A focused on impersonation prevention, official handle verification, and moderation.

events.title: Photography Workshop: Studio Lighting
events.description: Learn professional photography techniques for capturing your collection. Expert tips on lighting setups, camera settings, and post-processing for stunning collector photos.
events.summary: Learn professional photography techniques for capturing your collection.

events.title: Customization Show & Tell
events.description: Showcase your custom builds and modifications. Share photos, techniques, and materials used. Gallery submissions featured in monthly highlight reel.
events.summary: Showcase your custom builds and modifications.

events.title: Collector Meetup: North America
events.description: In-person meet-and-greet for collectors in North America. Bring your collection (or photos), connect with fellow enthusiasts, and enjoy exclusive merchandise.
events.location: Multiple cities (details shared with registered attendees)
events.summary: In-person meet-and-greet for collectors in North America.
